target_phenotype: Gene fitness effects across cancer cell lines — genes with correlated essentiality profiles are likely to function in the same pathway

readout.measurement: Cell fitness / viability after gene knockout
readout.instrument_or_platform: Genome-wide CRISPR screens across the Cancer Dependency Map (DepMap)
readout.primary_metric: Gene effect scores (CERES) — modules are co-essential gene clusters derived from correlated fitness profiles

clustering.method: Co-essentiality clustering of gene fitness profiles across cell lines

provenance.citation: Wainberg et al. (2021) Nat Genet. A genome-wide atlas of co-essential modules assigns function to uncharacterized genes.

notes: Each module represents genes that are co-essential across cancer cell lines. Genes in the same module likely participate in the same biological process or complex.
